author: SantiMod
content:
@here

The Atlas Brew #28 - SCREAM Combat! is confirmed. Join us this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

This week's topic is SCREAM Combat: How should loot be distributed after a large battle? If three factions are present, and the starbase gets destroyed, who should get ownership of the star system? 3 way battles, how should they work? What if the third just joins the attack/defense? And more!!   

The Atlas Brew is a WEEKLY Star Atlas Community Event based around having fun, speculating about the future and much more. 

See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC in the Voice Channel! Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

Nothing discussed in The Atlas Brew is guaranteed to make it to game and the event is purely for entertainment purposes.

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1013932599699316797
